3091410.name: SCP: Run For Freedom
3091410.description:
SCP: Run For Freedom (Escape for Freedom)

What is "SCP"?

This game is based on the SCP Foundation, which originated on the social network 4chan. This fictional foundation focuses on containing and studying anomalous creatures that could pose a threat to humanity.

What is this game about?

This game offers various gameplay modes, such as escaping the foundation as a "Class-D" (test subject), joining the Chaos Insurgency and eliminating any humans you encounter, or being part of a Mobile Task Force and attempting to contain SCPs that have breached containment.

Multiplayer

The game features a multiplayer mode with different types of gameplay, not just those based on single-player mode. It also includes a cooperative mode where players can work together to escape the facility.

SCPs

A considerable number of SCPs appear in this game. It aims to avoid repeating SCPs that have appeared in other SCP games in order to establish its own identity. However, the most well-known SCPs are also included in this game.

Customization

As a free-to-play game, it includes a "store" section where players can obtain various items in exchange for in-game currency. This currency can be purchased or earned for free during special in-game events.

DLCs

The game comes with 3 maps and multiplayer mode for free. Additional maps (with new SCPs, items, and more) will be available to expand the content. These DLCs will mainly be paid, but some may also be obtained for free.

英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
